deviceGate.title: Use a phone or tablet
deviceGate.description: This page is only available on mobile devices and tablets.

order.loadErrorDescription: Check your internet connection and try again.
order.emptyMenuDescription: This restaurant has no menu items yet.

checkout.paymentFailed: Payment could not be processed. Please try again.

cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add items from the menu.
cart.title: Your order

menuItem.noDescription: No description was added for this item.

root.noRestaurantDescription: Open this app from a restaurant QR code, or visit a restaurant link you used before.
root.scanHint: We remember the last place you opened — next time you land here you will be redirected automatically.

landing.defaultSubtitle: Browse the menu or check table availability before you sit down.

tables.subtitle: Live availability from the floor plan
tables.noLayoutDescription: This restaurant has not published a table layout yet.
tables.reservedModalBody: This table is not available right now. We will refresh the layout when the countdown ends.

paymentReturn.noPaymentSession: Could not determine the payment session. Return to the menu from the QR code and try again.
paymentReturn.title: Thank you!
paymentReturn.description: Your order was received. Payment is being processed by Przelewy24.
paymentReturn.statusChangeHint: The status may update shortly — you can refresh or close the page and come back later.

success.title: Thank you!
success.description: Payment was received. Your order is confirmed.

pending.title: Your order reached the kitchen. Awaiting acceptance.
pending.description: The order is waiting to be accepted by the kitchen.

unfinished.title: Payment incomplete
unfinished.description: Payment could not be confirmed. If money was taken, contact Przelewy24 support.
